_purpose: The standard eval set for the cloner. Every capability phase is gated by honest-grade.mjs across ALL of these, not just Stripe — generality is the bar. Public homepages, captured at 1440/768/375.

sites.stresses: gradient-clipped text, animated WebGL hero, scroll motion, dense bento, proprietary font
dark theme, gradients, glow/blur effects, subtle entrance motion, custom font
code blocks, syntax highlighting, multi-column, clean type scale
text-dominant, simple layout, hand-drawn illustration, few effects
many components, dark/light, gradients, hover-rich cards, motion
